description: Composition Red and green plaid shirt with black accents made of 100% cotton, with full sleeves and a button on the elbow, full length buttoned placket, patch pocket on left chest and a curved hemline Fit Relaxed Wash care Pre-soak the garment before wash Wash inside out with zippers and buttons fastened Preferably hand washed Use only mild detergents Wash dark colours separately Do not attempt to remove stains by spot washing Drip dry on hanger and avoid wringing Flat dry Preferably steam iron This red and green plaid full sleeved shirt from scullers is a great addition to your wardrobe. The red and green combo gives off a fresh vibe. Pair this shirt with denims or chinos and semi-formal leather shoes for a cool casual look. Model statistics The model wears size 40 Height-6', Shoulders-18"
